Info

Defines abstract class IReporter with method(s). Creates an interface for reporting message.

class ats_utilities.reporter.ireporter.IReporter[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class IReporter with method(s). Creates an interface for reporting message.

It defines:

attributes:

None

methods:
error - Reports error message.
success - Reports success message.
verbose - Reports verbose message.
warning - Reports warning message.
__str__ - Returns the ATS reporter as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract error(message: List[Any]) → None[source]¶

Reports error message.

Parameters:

message (<List[Any]>) – List with message.

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract success(message: List[Any]) → None[source]¶

Reports success message.

Parameters:

message (<List[Any]>) – List with message.

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract verbose(is_verbose: bool, message: List[Any]) → None[source]¶

Reports verbose message.

Parameters:

  • is_verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option.

  • message (<List[Any]>) – List with message.

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract warning(message: List[Any]) → None[source]¶

Reports warning message.

Parameters:

message (<List[Any]>) – List with message.

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError
